description: Red Hat provides enterprise open source software and cloud services, including Linux, Kubernetes/OpenShift, automation, and AI platforms. Its web properties include the Customer Portal, Hybrid Cloud Console, documentation, and developer resources.
summary: Red Hat exposes at least a Hybrid Cloud Console Catalog Inventory REST API plus a GraphQL endpoint under `cloud.redhat.com`, authenticated with Red Hat-issued API tokens/offline-token-based access tokens; Red Hat also documents MCP offerings, but the scraped pages here did not reveal a public connect endpoint or concrete auth mechanics.
